identificationModule.officialTitle: Clinical Investigation to Assess the Efficacy of a Toothpaste Containing 8% Arginine as Compared to Colgate Cavity Protection Toothpaste in the Reduction of Dentinal Hypersensitivity.

interventions.name: TOMs of Maine Sensitive SLS Free Xtra Fresh
interventions.description:
Cover the entire length of bristled head with toothpaste. Brush your teeth twice daily (morning and evening) for one (1) minute each time.

For investigational use only by the study participant. Not for Sale.

interventions.name: Colgate Cavity protection toothpaste
interventions.description:
Cover the entire length of bristled head with toothpaste. Brush your teeth twice daily (morning and evening) for (2) two minutes each time.

For investigational use only by the study participant.

primaryOutcomes.measure: Tactile stimulation by the Yeaple Probe
primaryOutcomes.description: Hypersensitivity defined by a response score in the range of 10-50 grams of force.

Jet of air delivered by a standard dental unit syringe at a measured temperature of 19-21°C (70°F \[± 3°F\]) \[hypersensitivity defined by a response score of 2 or 3 on the Schiff Cold Air Sensitivity Scale
